testsuite.name: package1.AmazonApplication.TC11_ValidatingCheckoutProcess

testcase.name: validateCheckoutProcess
testcase.system-out: Browser Launched Successfully Hoverover on Accounts and list is successful Click on signin is successful Username entered successfully Click on continue button is successful Password entered successfully Click on submit is successful Product search is successful Click on add to cart is successful Click on go to cart is successful Click on Proceed to buy is successful Click on Change to change the address is successful Click on deliver to this address is successful Click on Payment option is successful Click on use this Payment method is successful

testcase.name: validateCheckoutProcess
